title: [River's Rest, Dining Room]
description: Fresh cooked meats and herbs beckon you to have a seat at one of the many tables here and enjoy some of the towns finest meals.  A servant passes you with a smile as she continues to a nearby table to deliver a feast for some of the hungry customers.  From a door to the south you hear an occasional rattle of pots and pans.

wayto.17070: ;e table = "Long River"; fput "go #{table} table" if dothistimeout("go #{table} table", 25, /You (?:and your group )?head over to|waves.*you.*(?:invites|inviting) you(?: and your group)? to (?:join|come sit at)/) =~ /inviting you|invites you/
